title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing board games. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A family is playing a board game in their living room. Two children are sitting on the floor while their parents are sitting on a sofa. There are game pieces, cards and drinks on a low table.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone riding a horse. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A teenage girl is riding a horse in the countryside. She is wearing a riding helmet and sitting carefully on the horse. There is a field, a wooden fence and trees behind her.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
